agent.name: AI Assistant
agent.greeting: Hi! How can I help you today?
agent.systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. You help users with their questions and tasks. Be concise, friendly, and professional.

microcopy.emptyState: Ask me anything. I'm here to help.
